title: viola × cestrica
intro: Viola × cestrica, also known as the hybrid pansy or pansy orchid, is a cross between the violet and pansy flowers, combining the characteristics of both plants. This hybrid has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, which help to soothe skin irritations, reduce pain, and calm digestive issues. The health benefits of Viola × cestrica include its ability to act as an antioxidant, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Viola × cestrica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from skin conditions to respiratory problems.
